title: Mosquito Man heals for half its battle damage

card.rawText: This creature heals for 1/2 of the Atk damage it inflicts during battle.

effect.value: This creature heals for 1/2 of the Atk damage it inflicts during battle.

plan.title: Mosquito Man heals for half its battle damage
plan.summary: Damage Mosquito Man before battle, then verify its lifesteal-style healing route is exercised from attack damage.

notes: Read text first: This creature heals for 1/2 of the Atk damage it inflicts during battle.
Set player_1 primary current HP to 20 before battle so healing is observable.

steps: Start battle with Mosquito Man as the attacker.
Resolve deterministic hit and damage rolls.
Inspect whether the source heals after attack damage is inflicted.

expectedAssertions.label: Mosquito Man healing increased HP above setup damage

manualVerification: Confirm the healed amount is half of inflicted Atk damage, rounded according to the card data.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Damage Mosquito Man before battle, then verify its lifesteal-style healing route is exercised from attack damage.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
